resilience_gap.description: Combined normalized resilience gap across all benchmark metrics.

benchmark_operating_margin_q75.description: Top-quartile (Q75) operating margin benchmark value for this org's cohort. Required so two builders can verify they computed the same benchmark for the same cohort.

benchmark_operating_runway_q75.description: Top-quartile (Q75) operating runway benchmark value for this org's cohort.

benchmark_revenue_diversification_q75.description: Top-quartile (Q75) revenue diversification benchmark value for this org's cohort.

operating_margin_gap.description: Per-metric normalized gap: org operating margin minus cohort benchmark, normalized within cohort.

operating_runway_gap.description: Per-metric normalized gap: org operating runway minus cohort benchmark, normalized within cohort.

revenue_diversification_gap.description: Per-metric normalized gap: org revenue diversification minus cohort benchmark, normalized within cohort.

revenue_diversification_index_renormaliz.description: Shadow metric: HHI complement computed after dropping null pct_ columns and rescaling remaining shares to sum to 1. Not used for scoring — carried for checkpoint sensitivity comparison.

confidence_reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why checkpoint1_confidence_tier landed where it did, e.g. '4 years in window', 'broadest fallback cohort', 'both'.

benchmark_fallback_step.description: Integer 1-4 indicating which resilient-peer-set fallback rule produced the final benchmark set. 1=strict all-3-for-5-of-7, 2=2-of-3, 3=4-of-7, 4=cohort broadened.

is_shared_sample.description: True for rows whose EIN appears in the 11 shared checkpoint sample EINs.
